title: Demon slayer pack
description: Adds katana and kimano from anime demon slayer to minecraft!
body:
# For correct work you need Optifine or CITResewn ### This resource pack adds several demon slayer anime katanas directly to your minecraft! ![Alt text](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/AYrcvMG3/images/386c43d51852ff655c366f8f17f4e61fef6fb46b.png 'Optional title') #### To get a katana, just rename any sword!
Katana names - Rename your sword "Shinobu" to make "Katana Shinobu" - Rename your sword "Tanziro" to make "Katana Tanziro" - Rename your sword "Inoske" to make "Katana Inoske" - Rename your sword "Tomioka" to make "Katana Tomioka" - Rename your sword "Zenitsu" to make "Katana Zenitsu"
#### To get a kimano, just rename any chestplate!
Kimano names - Rename your chestplate "Shinobu" to make "Kimano Shinobu" - Rename your chestplate "Tanziro" to make "Kimano Tanziro" - Rename your chestplate "Tomioka" to make "Kimano Tomioka" - Rename your chestplate "Zenitsu" to make "Kimano Zenitsu" - Rename your chestplate "Urokodaki" to make "Kimano Urokodaki"
#### To get a mask, just rename carved pumpkin!
Mask names - Rename carved pumpkin "Urokodaki" to make "Urokodaki mask" - Rename carved pumpkin "Sabito" to make "Sabito mask"
